scenario_name: Scenario 18 — Expert Subtle Bug: Event Loop Blocking
justification: All pass criteria met: parseXmlSync identified as Critical event loop blocking issue; 200 webhooks/min + 2MB + sync = event loop saturation clearly explained; async parsing recommended; early-response + failure inconsistency noted as first critical finding; idempotency concern noted in suggestions; safe_to_deploy is false.

observations.text: parseXmlSync correctly identified as Critical with detailed explanation of event loop starvation at 3.3 req/sec with 50-200ms blocking per parse
Early ACK issue elevated to first Critical finding with excellent explanation of silent data loss and carrier retry implications
Idempotency concern addressed in suggestions section
Excellent reproduction steps provided for each critical finding
Caught additional issues beyond rubric: deliveryMap bug silently dropping records, missing error handling causing process crashes, sequential DB updates
Production readiness section correctly notes cascading failure to health checks and pod restarts
Backward compatibility note about carrier retry policy when moving ACK is a thoughtful production consideration
